title: Products susceptible to illegal marketing - Canada.ca
content:
## Products susceptible to illegal marketing
Find out how manufacturers could advertise and influence health care providers and what you can do if you see or experience it.

Requirements for marketing medical devices, what to watch for, and how you can help
